title: Uniswap Governance Votes on Proposals to Route v4 Fees and Robinhood Chain Fees into UNI Burn
summary: Uniswap's governance is voting on two proposals that could increase the UNI token burn rate. The votes, open from July 19 to July 26, would route new fees from Uniswap v4 and the Robinhood Chain into the burn system established under the "UNIfication" overhaul in December 2025.
body:
Uniswap's governance is currently voting on two proposals that could significantly increase the burn rate of its native token, UNI. The first proposal involves allocating fees from Uniswap v4 to the burn system, while the second proposes routing fees from the Robinhood Chain expansion into the burn mechanism. Both proposals aim to direct new fees into the UNI burn system, which was created under the "UNIfication" overhaul in December 2025.

The voting period for these proposals is open from July 19 through July 26. If passed, these changes could lead to a higher burn rate for UNI, potentially reducing its supply and increasing its value over time. The proposals are part of Uniswap's ongoing efforts to enhance its ecosystem and provide more value to its token holders.

For everyday users, this could mean a more robust and valuable UNI token. A higher burn rate could lead to increased scarcity, potentially driving up the token's price. This could be particularly beneficial for those holding UNI, as they may see an appreciation in the value of their holdings.

Additionally, the expansion of the Robinhood Chain could bring more liquidity and trading opportunities to the Uniswap ecosystem. This could attract more users and traders, further strengthening the platform's position in the decentralized finance (DeFi) space.

Users should keep an eye on the voting results, which will be announced after July 26. If the proposals pass, the changes could start being implemented shortly thereafter, potentially leading to a more dynamic and valuable UNI token.
twitterThread: Uniswap's governance is voting on two proposals that could boost the UNI burn rate by routing fees from v4 and the Robinhood Chain into the burn system. Here's what's at stake:
Two key proposals: one for v4 fees to be routed to the burn system, another for Robinhood Chain expansion fees. Both aim to increase UNI's scarcity and value. Voting open from July 19 to July 26.

If passed, these changes could make UNI more valuable by increasing the burn rate. Watch for results after July 26. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-18-uniswap-governance-votes-on-uni-burn-expansion
standaloneTweet: Uniswap's governance is voting on two proposals that could boost the UNI burn rate by routing fees from v4 and the Robinhood Chain into the burn system. Voting ends July 26.
